title: practical english usage - Part 233

about to £3M  DRUGS    SEIZED   AT  AIRPORT POLICE  SEIZE  ARMS   AFTER   CAR  CHASE seize             take (especially in police and customs searches) grammar •  293   punctuation: full stop, question mark and exclamation mark she arrived.) not She phoned me as soon as she arrived. (     She phoned me. As soon as grammatically incomplete sentences.
